relocation.package_summary: unknown; I do not have live Google access in this environment and found no reliable public Mistral AI relocation-policy source in static knowledge. Treat relocation as a negotiation item: ask whether support is lump-sum, vendor-managed, tax-grossed-up, and whether it covers movers, temporary housing, flights, visa, lease-break, and sign-on true-up.

Any relocation support (e.g., lump-sum vs. broker-managed, coverage of movers/temporary housing/flights/lease-break) appears to be negotiated case-by-case rather than documented in a standardized policy.
